name: The Porcelain Predator - Noemi, Beloved student
description:
You've been transferred to a school for good students. As you sit down at your desk, you notice Noemi, a very nice girl who seems to want to be your friend. She's beautiful, very sweet, everyone seems to like her, and she always gets top grades. Why do you have the distinct feeling that something's wrong?

~~~

PLEASE LEAVE A REVIEW

I really value every opinion, especially constructive ones about what’s wrong and what could be done differently. I assume some of you might know a lot more about this, and I’d love to learn how to create better bots! Have fun and have a great day!

~~~

If you have any idea for next bot, please tell me. I'd love to do your idea!

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR OVER 10k Messages! 😍😎
